metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Hosted Stays Marketplace domain, covering guest booking, host growth, portfolio operations, and trust.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience carries only experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that experience.

capabilities.name: Discover and Shortlist Stays
capabilities.description: Help guests move from broad trip intent into a high-confidence shortlist of relevant hosted stays.

flows.title: Discover and Shortlist Stays
flows.description: From broad trip idea to a trusted shortlist.

dependencies.name: Inspiration & Category Discovery
dependencies.description: Guest entry surfaces that turn broad trip intent into relevant categories, destinations, and marketplace sessions.
dependencies.how: Uses browse and category entry to narrow broad intent into real stay exploration.

dependencies.name: Search, Ranking & Map Browse
dependencies.description: Guest search, ranking, filtering, and map-led browsing across homes, rooms, and stay attributes.
dependencies.how: Uses ranking and geo-intent to create the actual shortlist.

dependencies.name: Marketplace Intelligence & Experimentation
dependencies.description: Demand insight, experiment measurement, search intelligence, pricing signals, and marketplace reporting.
dependencies.how: Uses marketplace signal quality to improve relevance and ranking explainability.

dependencies.name: Listing Detail & Review Trust
dependencies.description: Listing page, review presentation, amenity clarity, host reputation, and policy explanation before booking.
dependencies.how: Uses listing trust evidence to reduce decision anxiety before booking.

capabilities.name: Book and Manage a Stay
capabilities.description: Convert guest intent into a confirmed reservation with clear payment, messaging, and issue-entry paths.

dependencies.name: Booking & Checkout
dependencies.description: Reservation creation, fee and policy explanation, payment choice, and booking confirmation.
dependencies.how: Uses booking orchestration to create the confirmed reservation.

dependencies.name: Payments, Taxes & Payouts
dependencies.description: Guest payments, host payouts, fee logic, refund handling, tax flows, and financial ledger state.
dependencies.how: Uses financial orchestration to collect payment and explain fees.

dependencies.name: Trip Messaging & Itinerary
dependencies.description: Reservation visibility, messaging, check-in coordination, and guest itinerary management.
dependencies.how: Uses messaging and itinerary state to support the pre-stay and in-stay journey.

capabilities.name: Launch a New Host
capabilities.description: Help new hosts publish a high-quality listing and reach first booking quickly with minimal setup complexity.
outcomes: Higher quality of newly activated supply

flows.title: Launch a New Host
flows.description: Move from interest to a live, bookable listing.

dependencies.name: Host Onboarding & Verification
dependencies.description: Host signup, onboarding, readiness checks, and verification before a listing goes live.
dependencies.how: Uses onboarding and readiness checks to move hosts into launchable state.

dependencies.name: Listing Authoring & Content
dependencies.description: Listing setup, content editing, photo guidance, policy selection, and amenity configuration.
dependencies.how: Uses content authoring to create a trustworthy, searchable listing.

dependencies.name: Local Compliance & Policy Controls
dependencies.description: Market-specific rule management, listing eligibility controls, policy enforcement, and audit state.
dependencies.how: Uses compliance controls so the listing can go live safely in that market.

dependencies.name: Calendar & Availability
dependencies.description: Date availability, stay rules, booking windows, and availability accuracy controls.
dependencies.how: Uses calendar controls to make the inventory bookable.

dependencies.name: Pricing & Discounts
dependencies.description: Nightly pricing, discount programs, stay rules, and monetization guidance for hosts and operators.
dependencies.how: Uses pricing control to help hosts get to a reasonable first-booking strategy.

capabilities.name: Operate a Host Portfolio
capabilities.description: Help professional hosts and co-hosts manage multiple listings, operators, and revenue workflows with portfolio control.

flows.title: Operate a Host Portfolio
flows.description: Run multi-listing operations with controlled delegation and performance visibility.

dependencies.name: Co-host Network & Permissions
dependencies.description: Delegated operations, listing-level permissions, and portfolio collaboration across hosts and co-hosts.
dependencies.how: Uses role-based access so multiple operators can manage the same portfolio safely.

dependencies.name: Turnover & Operations Coordination
dependencies.description: Changeover, cleaning, readiness, and reservation-level operating coordination.
dependencies.how: Uses reservation-linked operations tracking to keep stays ready.

dependencies.name: Host Performance & Earnings
dependencies.description: Occupancy, earnings, response quality, listing performance, and operator reconciliation views.
dependencies.how: Uses performance and earnings insight to make portfolio decisions.

capabilities.name: Recover Issues and Protect the Marketplace
capabilities.description: Handle claims, fraud, unsafe bookings, and disruption recovery without breaking guest or host trust.

flows.title: Recover Issues and Protect the Marketplace
flows.description: Handle high-friction trust and financial incidents.

dependencies.name: Identity & Verification
dependencies.description: Guest and host identity verification, document checks, and core screening signals.
dependencies.how: Uses verification to inform trust-sensitive reservations and marketplace identity state.

dependencies.name: Trust, Safety & AirCover
dependencies.description: Reservation screening, trust enforcement, host protection, guest safety, and AirCover-related controls.
dependencies.how: Uses trust decisions and protection logic to intervene early.

dependencies.name: Resolutions & Support
dependencies.description: Structured support, claims, refund, dispute, and service-recovery workflows.
dependencies.how: Uses case handling to coordinate outcomes across all parties.

dependencies.name: Payments, Taxes & Payouts
dependencies.description: Guest payments, host payouts, fee logic, refund handling, tax flows, and financial ledger state.
dependencies.how: Uses financial state and payout logic to complete the resolution.
